templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://curvycouture.com/collections/plus-size-bra-and-panty-clearance-sale

templates.name: When will you release the Cosmic Blue Panties?
templates.content: Cosmic Blue Panties will be available on the site in the middle of June 2023.

templates.name: This is my 2nd return/exchange - why can't I get instant credits?
templates.content: Our system only allows you to do a return/exchange once to receive an instant credit. The 2nd time, a refund will automatically be issued to the original form of payment after processing.

templates.name: What is a Convertible bra?
templates.content: The beauty of the convertible bra is that they are all-purpose and give you so many options! You can wear it under a variety of different shirts and still get the support of a full coverage bra. Choose a convertible bra with proper support so that no matter which way you decide to wear it, you still look your very best. Try our Convertible Spacer T-shirt Bra or Perfect Plunge Multi-Way and have a "bra changing" experience.

templates.name: Is there a way to get shaping in a panty without having to buy constricting shapewear?
templates.content: Yes, some panties have additional support built into the front panel of the panty. You can take a look at any of our panties. They have a double lined front panel for shaping and bonded edges that lie flat against the body for a smooth, seamless shape.

templates.name: What is the best way to care for my bras?
templates.content: All-around bra care is important whether your bra is underwire or soft cup. It is always best to follow the garment's care instructions. The most common washing instructions include hand washing and line/flat drying. It is also important to rotate the bras in your bra wardrobe, so your bras wear evenly.

templates.name: What is the benefit of a wider bra strap?
templates.content: Full-figure women may find more comfort and support in bras with wider straps. Comfortable straps are of focus at Curvy Couture, where all bras are designed to have a slightly wider, cushioned strap for your everyday comfort. Thin straps can distress the shoulders due to the amount of pressure exerted on a thinner piece of fabric. Wider straps alleviate some of the pressure and can help properly support large breasts without causing stress in the shoulder and arms.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: At the moment we only ship in the US and Canada.

templates.name: What do I do if my breasts are unevenly sized or asymmetrical?
templates.content: This is a common problem for many women, with some having more extreme differences than others. The best solution to this problem is to purchase a bra with stretch cups. Check out our Cotton Luxe Bras here: https://curvycouture.com/collections/cotton-luxe

templates.name: What is the best way to put on a bra?
templates.content: Wearing your bra properly is as important as finding the correct bra to wear. Place your arms through the straps and slide them over your shoulders. Bend forward from the waist and adjust your breasts so that the nipples are at the fullest point of the cup. Make sure your breasts are completely in the cup. Then fasten the hooks to the middle position. Finally stand up straight and adjust your straps again, so your breasts are at the right level in the bra.

templates.name: Where are your products made?
templates.content: Our products are made in Indonesia, but the sizing is US sizing since the items are designed here in the USA and made with our specifications.

templates.name: What are your panties made of? Material?
templates.content: Mesh panties are a nylon spandex blend, cotton luxe panties are a viscose cotton blend.

templates.name: Are the underwear individually wrapped?
templates.content: Yes, all bras and panties are individually polybagged. Also, all panties are clearly stated to be final sale due to hygienic reasons.

templates.name: Do you price match?
templates.content: We can't price match other intimate brand's sales. We do however have promotions monthly and rest assured our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out.

templates.content: We don't restock fashion colors. Only core colors are restocked: Bark, Blushing Rose, Black, and Chocolate Nude. For our core colors, feel free to sign up on the product page and you'll be notified the second it comes back in.

templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $100 before taxes and after discounts are applied. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS. Once shipped, it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://curvycouture.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Our system is highly automated so we're unable to make any changes to an order after it has been placed. Apologies for the inconvenience!

templates.name: How do I redeem my points?
templates.content:
Points earned can be redeemed as follows:

• 50 points = $5 gift card
• 100 points = $10 gift card
• 250 points = $25 gift card

You must be logged into your account via Curvycouture.com, not Shop pay app. Please log out of the ShopPay app as that is a 3rd party app and not affiliated with our company. Simply add the items to the shopping cart and at checkout there will be a drop-down menu to select the amount of loyalty points to redeem.

Please note that loyalty points can't be used in conjunction with any sale discount promotions.

templates.name: Will you be restocking the Luxe Lace Wireless Bra?
templates.content: I'm afraid the Luxe Lace Wireless Bra has been discontinued and we will not be restocking it.

templates.name: Can I redeem more than 250 points at a time?
templates.content: Please note that you can redeem a maximum of 250 points per order.

templates.name: Damaged bra
templates.content: Please email us directly at hello@curvycouture.com with photos of the damaged bra and one of my colleagues will be more than happy to help out!

templates.content: Yes, they are.
